$comment: Design token file for the Menu Item component
$description: A single row in a mobile context menu. 187px wide. Composed of an optional leading icon (20px), a content column (label + optional subtext), a flexible spacer, and an optional trailing chevron-right icon (24px). Two types: Default (dark gray text) and Destructive (red text and icon — used for irreversible actions such as Delete). An optional 1px divider renders below the row to separate it from the next item.

background.description: Neutral background for every row regardless of type- gray/0 - #ffffff

padding.description: 8px inset on all sides of the row

gap.description: 8px horizontal gap between the leading icon and the content column

size.description: Width and height of the optional leading semantic icon - 20px

height.description: Fixed height of the label container row - 24px

gap.description: Gap between inline elements within the label row (e.g. label text and a badge) - 4px

typography.description: 13px Regular, 18px line-height — optional secondary description below the label

width.description: Fixed width applied to the subtext paragraph to constrain its layout within the row

size.description: Width and height of the trailing chevron icon - 24px

name.description: GHL icon name for the trailing navigation indicator

height.description: Height of the separator line rendered below the row when divider=true - 1px

color.description: Subtle gray separator between menu rows - gray/200 - #eaecf0

label-color.description: Near-black label text for standard (non-destructive) actions - gray/900 - #101828

subtext-color.description: Same as label color; subtext uses same hue at lighter weight - gray/900 - #101828

icon-color.description: Leading and trailing icons match label color in Default type - gray/900 - #101828

label-color.description: Red label text signalling an irreversible/destructive action - error/600 - #dc6803

subtext-color.description: Red subtext matching the label to reinforce the destructive signal - error/600 - #dc6803

icon-color.description: Leading icon rendered in red for Destructive type - error/600 - #d92d20
